description: Triggered when the user wants to implement authentication, login/register flows, session management, OAuth, JWT tokens, or role-based access control in a Next.js app.
should_trigger: Set up Auth.js v5 with Google OAuth in my Next.js app
Implement a login and registration form with credentials provider
How do I protect routes so only authenticated users can access /dashboard?
Add role-based access control so only admins can access /admin
Set up JWT tokens with refresh token rotation
Implement rate limiting on the login endpoint
Create a Prisma schema for users with Auth.js session management
should_not_trigger: How do I fetch data from an external API in Next.js?
Set up Stripe payments with webhook handling
Create a contact form that sends emails
How do I deploy my app with SSL certificates?
